steps.title: Identify the input meaning
steps.content: In the model, $t$ is the number of years after $1987$. Therefore $t=7$ means $7$ years after $1987$.

steps.title: Identify the output meaning
steps.content: The output $P(t)$ is the predicted population in millions. So the statement means that when $t=7$, the predicted population was about $31.94$ million. The answer is C.
